1. Avoid Repeated time.monotonic() Syscalls in Loops
We removed repeated calls to the time.monotonic() system function inside loops in the _insert_helper and match_prefix methods.
These operations are very fast, so the time difference from multiple calls is negligible.

The sglang-bot run-ci labeler and the auto-labeler are working against each other. When two separate workflows (labeler.yml and label-pr.yml) were both triggered simultaneously on the same PR events (opened, reopened). They were both modifying labels independently, causing the later-finis

sglang.title: Unify memory management across `(overlap, non-overlap) x (page>=1) x (spec, non-spec, spec v2) x (retract, finished)`
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
This PR replaces the old approach to releasing KV cache, which relied on len(self.origin_input_ids) + max(len(self.output_ids) - 1, 0) to determine the KV length.
That approach is brittle with overlap scheduling and with multiple finish paths (normal completion, disaggregation-decode finish, retract

Memory leakage happens with the newly added CI tests. Waiting for #12224 to be merged to handle memory leakage.

vllm.title: [Metrics] Refactor LoRA state tracking
vllm.author: markmc
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
LoRARequestStates serves a simple purpose - keep track on a per-lora basis which requests are running, and which are waiting.
The current implementation is somewhat sloppy and over-complicated:

LoRAStats is never freed if a LoRA becomes unused or unloaded (reported by @WoosukKwon)
We leak if log_st

Fix SigLIP text embedding batch processing error when batch size > 1, as reported in #27566.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Avoid calling KV connector layer APIs when metadata is unset
vllm.author: sdavidbd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Fixes #26675, following the approach suggested by @markmc in #27026.
This change temporarily disables graph capture for the KV connector path by skipping calls to KV connector layer APIs when the connector metadata is unset.
Test Plan
Reproduce the scenario described in #26675 (full-graph ca
